title: Bridge Essay: Toward Enhanced Teleoperation Through Embodiment.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through Toward, Enhanced, Teleoperation, Through, Embodiment..

**Toward Enhanced Teleoperation Through Embodiment.** — Front Robot AI. PMID: 33501183. DOI: 10.3389/frobt.2020.00014. Telerobotics aims to transfer human manipulation skills and dexterity over an arbitrary distance and at an arbitrary scale to aremote workplace. Atelerobotic system that is transparent enables anatural and intuitive interaction. We postulate that embodiment (with three sub-components: sense of ownership, agency, and self-location) of the robotic system leads to optimal perceptual transparency and increases task performance. However, this has not yet been investigated directly. We reason along
